subcodes.first_line: A supplication to the Abhá Kingdom: O Kind Beloved! I am thirsting for the pure crystal waters of Thy bounty; grant me from the fountain of Thy love a draught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مناجات بملکوت ابهی کن محبوب مهربانا تشنه زلال عنایتم از چشمه محبتت جرعه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
